overall.description: Fantasy game footage depicting a character riding a winged hippogriff mount. The sequence begins at night in a historic stone village with warm lantern light, followed by takeoff and an aerial tour over coastal cliffs, a massive castle on a rock outcrop, and surrounding mountains before returning toward the settlement.
